_doc: NEGATIVE fixture for the D6-1 ecosystem-bare-org-slug shape (ECO-IMPL W1-S3). Mirrors the committed ecosystem.example.json: every org/host value is a synthetic example-* / <org> placeholder (allowlist-covered) or a dotted public registry host (no match). The file-scoped shape applies (basename matches /^ecosystem.*\.json$/) but produces ZERO findings — proving the shape does not false-positive on the synthetic vocabulary the public-fork example carries. All tokens SYNTHETIC.
